creator: john@sanren.ac.za
text:
It does work, I am using the packages that I built.

The reason I moved it is because I wanted googleearth-pro in the path (/usr/local/bin) because people don't normally have /compat/linux/... in their path, and also to have google-earth-pro.desktop in /usr/local/share/applications/ so that window managers will automatically pick it up.

If there are other ways, I'm all ears, or if someone wants to do it, I'm also ok.
